hero.titleHtml: We'd Love to Hear From You
hero.subtitle: Whether you'd like to schedule a visit, ask about our programmes, or simply say hello — our team is here and happy to help.

ctaSection.heading: Choose How You'd Like to Connect
ctaSection.intro: We're available via WhatsApp, email, or phone. Pick what works best for you.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.body: Chat with us directly for a quick response. Available during school hours.

email.title: Email
email.body: Send us a detailed message and we'll get back to you within one business day.

phone.title: Call Us
phone.body: Speak directly with our admissions team. Tap to dial on your mobile device.

visit.heading: Visit Our Campus
visit.intro: We welcome prospective families to tour our campus. Come see where learning comes to life.

hoursCard.title: Office Hours
hoursCard.footnote: WhatsApp enquiries are monitored during office hours.

socialCard.title: Follow Us
socialCard.body: Stay connected for school updates, events, and student life highlights.

map.heading: How to Find Us
map.iframeTitle: Aletheia Resource Center location on Google Maps

form.heading: Send Us a Message
form.introHtml: Fill in the form and a member of our admissions team will be in touch with you shortly. All fields marked with * are required.

trust.title: We respond within 1 business day
trust.body: Enquiries submitted after hours are answered the next school day.

trust.title: Your data is safe with us
trust.body: We do not share your information with third parties.

form.successBody: Thank you for reaching out. A member of our admissions team will be in touch with you within one business day.
form.generalError: Please correct the errors below and try again.

placeholders.name: e.g. Sarah Abdullah
placeholders.message: Tell us how we can help — questions about enrolment, a visit request, or anything else on your mind.

form.privacyHtml: By submitting this form you agree to our Privacy Policy.
